violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet towel found on the counter during inspection. Wet wiping cloths should be stored in a sanitizing solution between uses or laundered.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the reach-in cooler was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Clean equipment stored on shelving unit found dirtied with flour. Equipment should be stored in a location protected from contamination.
Linen storage. — --Observed food employee go into the restroom while wearing apron. Aprons should be removed before using restroom.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling tiles and vents found dirty. Flooring under equipment was also found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the kitchen reach-in refrigerator and the door handles for both the reach-in refrigerator and the reach-in freezer were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
